name: scribe
description: Transcribe local audio with Scribe STT jobs and reconcile canonical transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Transcribe local audio and reconcile canonical transcripts
interface.longDescription: Scribe provides scribe:transcribe for file-path-in local audio transcription, local STT setup/status/transcription MCP tools, background STT jobs with incremental variant outputs, and scribe:canon for comparing multiple STT transcript files from one recording, asking evidence-first clarification with provenance, producing a canonical transcript, and isolating high-impact ambiguities for user review.
defaultPrompt: Transcribe this local audio file with Scribe
Use scribe:canon on these transcript files
